name: Alert
summary: Always on the lookout for danger, you gain the following benefits:

documentBlocks.text: Always on the lookout for danger, you gain the following benefits:

items: You can't be surprised while you are conscious.
You gain a +5 bonus to initiative.
Other creatures don't gain advantage on attack rolls against you as a result of being unseen by you.

highlights: You can't be surprised while you are conscious.
You gain a +5 bonus to initiative.
Other creatures don't gain advantage on attack rolls against you as a result of being unseen by you.
